blended.narrative: Gore Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
